content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian saw Jun Zu.

Jun Zu's image is humanoid, but he is covered in scales, his head has antennae, his pupils are golden, and his body exudes an incomparably terrifying aura.

However, this still restrained the breath, otherwise the breath alone would be enough to make him unable to move.

Now.

Jun Zu saw Ye Tian and looked at it carefully.

"The body is ordinary, the potential is average, how much Jinwen have you mastered?"

Jun Zu asked.

"Qi Yu Jun Ancestor, I have mastered all the Golden Inheritance of the Other Shore of the Golden Inheritance of the Other Side!"

Ye Tian said.

"Oh, you really have all the Golden Inheritance on the other side?"

Jun Zu was a little unconvinced.

Then.

Ye Tian inspired the imprint of the golden inscription on the other side.

Airplanes!!!!

The mark of inheritance is revealed, and this is the best proof of this.

Jun Zu showed a look of surprise, "Very good, although your potential is not good, your physical body is not good, but this can be cultivated slowly, it seems that you have an unimaginable talent in the other side of the Golden Script, and your comprehension is also very high." It's just that the Eternal Great Ape Clan is too weak to cultivate you. "

"Would you like to be my disciple?"

Jun Zu asked.

Jun Zu rarely accepts apprentices, and the Eternal True Beast clan is not very prosperous in accepting apprentices, and the other Eternal True Beasts only care about their own race.

But Jun Zu likes to accept apprentices, but many of the Eternal True Beast Clan's bone transformation realm wisdom is very low, and they can't even comprehend a golden text on the other side, and their potential is too bad.

If it weren't for the numbers, the True Beast Alliance would really not be able to compete with forces like Gu Heng Mountain and Gu Demon Sea.

Therefore, Junzu's standard for accepting apprentices is not very high.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Good!"

Junzu is in a very good mood.

Subsequently, he announced to the entire True Beast Alliance that he would accept Ye Tian as a disciple.

After receiving the apprentices, Jun Zu began to teach Ye Tian patiently.

"Dong Yuan, I'm going to build you into a genius on the other side, although the process is very difficult, but you have a little hope!" Jun Zu said.

"The other side level genius!" Ye Tian hurriedly asked, "It's not that if you become an ancient level genius, it will be difficult to break through the realm, then wouldn't it be even more difficult to break through if you become a level genius on the other side!"

He asked this deliberately, just to understand some secrets.

Whether it was Gu Heng Mountain, or other forces, it was not recommended to cultivate an ancient-level genius, unless he was willing to take the path of an ancient-level genius.

But.

For the other side of the world, they are very eager to cultivate, but unfortunately it is too difficult!

Jun Zu said with a smile: "It is indeed difficult to cultivate an ancient-level genius, and the difficulty of becoming a seventh-stage bone transformation realm is many times more difficult than that of an ordinary bone transformation realm becoming a ninth-stage bone transformation realm. But the other side level genius is different, once you become the other side level genius, there will be a qualitative change. Of course, with ordinary resources, it is indeed difficult for a genius at the other side to break through, and it is even difficult to cultivate. But in the land of eternity, there is a resource-the source stone on the other side, and it is easy to refine the flesh by using the source stone on the other side. Our Eternal True Beast Clan can use the Origin Stone on the other side to continuously refine the physical body and improve their cultivation. On the cultivator's side, they can use the source stone on the other side to temper the immeasurable bones of the geniuses on the other side, and everyone has a way to quickly improve their cultivation. Therefore, everyone really wants to cultivate a genius at the other side. "

"If we Eternal True Beasts want to become a genius on the other side, it will be more difficult, right?

Ye Tian's words are obvious, you have to help me, otherwise I can't.

He wanted to take the opportunity to get something good from Junzu.

Otherwise, why would he be apprenticed?

Jun Zu said: "Don't worry, I will do my best to help you." In terms of comprehension and understanding of the golden text on the other side, you are undoubtedly the most talented one in the True Beast Alliance. Next, you have to comprehend some of the Haven on the other side, and after you have comprehended some of the Haven on the other side, you can then cultivate an ancient technique and become an ancient-level genius first. After that, he relied on the long years to slowly study the magic of the other side. Remember, when you are studying the magic of the other side, you must study it by my side, I can save you in time, otherwise if you study it yourself, it will be easy to die!"

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tian nodded.

From Jun Zu's words, it can be guessed that Jun Zu has a way to save it by studying the magic power of the other side, but it is impossible to succeed 100%.

In the following days, Jun Zu did give him a lot of resources to help him refine his physical body.

The path taken by the Eternal True Beast is not the same as that of a cultivator, but it is actually about the same.

And.

Jun Zu also gave him a lot of the Haven on the other side for him to understand, and some of the Haven on the other side was the Haven on the other side that he had not mastered.

It can be said that with Jun Zu's resources, his vest has grown rapidly, faster than the progress of the ontology.

And.

With Jun Zu's guidance, he has more experience in the study of the magic skills on the other side.

Moreover, Jun Zu also has an understanding of the golden body on the other side.

But the county lord did not point out this aspect, but let him devote himself to the magic of the other side.

After all, if the golden body on the other side has to go at the same time, the cost will be even greater.

Therefore, only by cultivating the magic power of the other side can it be possible to succeed, and you can't have both, otherwise you may fail.

But.

Ye Tian's true body copy body is still carrying out the cultivation of the golden body on the other side, as well as the study of the magic power on the other side, and they are all going on at the same time.

Anyway, he is different from Jun Zu, he has a copy of the body, so he dares to do this.

Time flies.

After Ye Tian had so many golden texts on the other side, he continued to study the golden incarnation on the other side.

As the long years passed, more and more gold on his body became more and more.

After a period of time, both of his arms completed the golden body of the other side, and began to create the corresponding golden body method of the other side of the body from other positions, so that the other positions could also complete the golden body of the other side.

True Beast Alliance.

Ye Tian's vest has become an ancient-level genius, and he is a top-notch primordial-level genius, and his physical body has been tempered to an extremely strong level.

The speed of its progress amazed Jun Zu, and he gave more resources for this.

And.

As Ye Tian mastered more and more of the Haven on the other side, Jun Zu began to preach for him often, which made him understand the Golden Script and the Haven on the other side more thoroughly.

But even so, it was impossible for him to study the magic technique of the other side under Jun Zu's nose in a short period of time, otherwise the progress would be too fast, and it would be too exaggerated.

In the blink of an eye.

Three thousand primeval eras have passed.

After such a long period of research, Ye Tian's true body copy body finally created the first Beyond Divine Power Technique.

When he created this Otherside Divine Power Technique and successfully imprinted it on his body, the Origin Power Seed of the Other Shore in his body quickly stated, and the endless Origin Power of the Other Shore exploded, enveloping his body.

Rumble!!!!!

The terrifying aura of the origin on the other side permeated the air, alarming the deputy mountain masters of Guheng Mountain.
